message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
participant "LoginPartialView" as LPV
participant "MicrosoftIdentityLibrary" as MIL
participant "HomeController" as HC
database "StudieTipsDB" as DB

User -> LPV : clicks on "Register"
LPV -> HC : sends action
HC --> LPV : Creates RegisterView

loop While user not registered
    User -> LPV : inputs e-mail, password and password confirmation

    alt E-mail is invalid
        LPV --> User : Display 'The Email field is not a valid e-mail address'.
    else Password is less than 6 or greater than 100 characters
        LPV --> User : Display 'The password must be at least 6 and at max 100 chracters long.'
    else Password and confirmation password do not match
        LPV --> User : Display 'The password and confirmation password do not match'
    end

    User -> LPV : User clicks register button

    alt Password does not contain at least one symbol
        LPV --> User : Display 'Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character'.
    else Passord does not contain at least one digit
        LPV --> User : Display 'Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9')'.
    else Password does not contain uppercase letters
        LPV --> User : Display 'Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').'
    else Password does not contain 4 different characters
        LPV --> User : Display 'Passwords must use at least 4 different characters.'
    else E-mail is already in use
        LPV --> User : Display 'Username 'E-mail' is already taken.'
    end

    LPV -> MIL : Creates user with e-mail and password
end

MIL -> HC : returns action
HC --> HC : Create home view

@enduml
```
